issue: Error display block is placed outside the JSX return statement (lines 47-53). The code has `{error && (` appearing after the loading check but before the component's return statement, making it invalid JSX that will never render.
improvement: Move the error display block inside the main return JSX, typically after the loading check and before the main content, or conditionally render it within the JSX.

issue: The `runAgent` function is incomplete (line 101). It starts with `async function runAgent(agentType: string) {` but has no function body - just an opening brace with nothing inside. This is a syntax error that will break the page compilation.
improvement: Complete the runAgent function with the actual implementation to handle agent execution, or remove it if not needed.

issue: Critical content mismatch - metadata description claims "21 AI agents" but only 8 agents are actually rendered in the array. This destroys credibility and misleads visitors.
improvement: Change the metadata description to match actual content: `description: 'Meet our 8 AI agents for sales, development, content, and operations.'` OR populate the remaining 13 agents to reach 21.

issue: No Call-to-Action (CTA) anywhere on the page. Visitors have no way to take action - no "Contact Us", "Get Started", or conversion path. This defeats the page's business purpose.
improvement: Add a CTA section after the agents grid, before the Footer. Include a button like `<Link href="/contact" className="bg-blue-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-blue-700 transition">Build Your AI Team</Link>`

issue: No contact information displayed (phone, email, office location) — only a form with a weak trust signal. Best practices require multiple contact options for credibility and user accessibility.
improvement:
Add a contact info section after the hero and before the form: ```tsx

Email

hello@ppventures.tech

Location

San Francisco, CA

Response Time

Within 24 hours

```

issue: Form grid uses `gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr'` with no mobile breakpoints — breaks on phones, causing horizontal scroll and poor UX. Best practices require mobile optimization.
improvement:
Replace fixed grid with responsive styles:
```tsx
<div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))', gap: 16 }}>
```
Apply same pattern to second grid row and add viewport meta tag if not present in layout.

issue: The particle connection code is incomplete and cut off mid-line at `ctx.moveTo(p.x, p` — this causes a syntax error and breaks the particle connections feature entirely.
Missing cleanup for the animation loop — `animationId` is never cancelled on component unmount, causing potential memory leaks and continued background processing.
Truncated/incomplete comment at line 158 breaks CSS syntax and indicates missing focus state implementation
Missing button variants — only primary `.btn` exists, no secondary/ghost button style for CTAs

Zero trust signals. In 2026, VC homepages require social proof (portfolio companies, featured logos, stats) to establish credibility. A visitor landing here has no evidence PPVentures has successfully funded or built anything.
improvement:
Add a trust section after the hero (before Footer). Insert around line 80: ```tsx

TRUSTED BY FOUNDERS FROM

{/* Placeholder logos - replace with actual company logos */} YC Techstars Stripe Sequoia
$50M+
Deployed
25+
Portfolio Companies
3
Exits
```

issue: The second agent's cta_button object is truncated/incomplete - it ends with "ct" leaving the CTA configuration broken
improvement: Complete the cta_button object for the appointment_scheduler agent with proper fields: cta_text, cta_url, cta_color, and cta_hover_text
